# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: third-party-apis
spec:
  hosts:
  - 'third-party-api.example.com'
  - 'another-api.example.org'
  endpoints:
  - address: 35.198.233.177
    ports:
      http2: 80
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-databases
spec:
  hosts:
  - 'db1.example.com'
  - 'db2.example.org'
  endpoints:
  - address: 35.196.223.177
    ports:
      mysql: 3306
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: internal-api-gateway
spec:
  hosts:
  - 'api-gateway.default.svc.cluster.local'
  endpoints:
  - address: 10.20.30.40
    ports:
      http2: 80
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-kafka-broker
spec:
  hosts:
  - 'kafka-broker.example.com'
  endpoints:
  - address: 35.202.223.177
    ports:
      kafka: 9092
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-rabbitmq-server
spec:
  hosts:
  - 'rabbitmq-server.example.org'
  endpoints:
  - address: 35.205.223.177
    ports:
      rabbitmq: 5672
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-redis-instance
spec:
  hosts:
  - 'redis-instance.example.com'
  endpoints:
  - address: 35.208.223.177
    ports:
      redis: 6379
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-services
spec:
  hosts:
  - 'third-party-api.example.com'
  - 'db1.example.com'
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: '/external-path'
    rewrite:
      authority: third-party-api.example.com
    redirect:
      port: 80
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-services
spec:
  host: third-party-api.example.com
  trafficPolicy:
    loadBalancer:
      simple: {}
